item.title: Useful resources for data analysis
item.description: Microbiomes: DADA2 I like to analyse all of my microbiome data directly in R with the Benjamin Callahan's DADA2 package. This is an Amplicon Sequence Variants (ASV) approach, relying on fancy run-specific error models for denoising. The DADA2 tutorial is a great place to start if you're interested in this method. Metagenomes and MAGs: Anvio Meren and friends have built an immense resource for analysing metagenomes and metagenome-assembled genomes (MAGs).
